name: BentPlateGeometrySolver
summary: BentPlateGeometrySolver is a solver class to handle ConnectiveGeometry modification related computations.

constructors.name: BentPlateGeometrySolver
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the BentPlateGeometrySolver class.

methods.name: AddLeg(ConnectiveGeometry, Contour)
methods.signature: public ConnectiveGeometry AddLeg(ConnectiveGeometry geometry, Contour polygon)
methods.summary: Appends a polygon section to ConnectiveGeometry, using the maximal radius for the cylindrical connection.

params.name: geometry
params.doc: ConnectiveGeometry used to create a connection with.

params.name: polygon
params.doc: The polygonal contour to add to geometry.

returns.doc: Modified ConnectiveGeometry if command succeeded or geometry otherwise.

throws.when: Thrown if could not create or modify ConnectiveGeometry instance.
Thrown when geometry is a stand-alone bend geometry, meaning that the first GeometrySection is a BendSurfaceNode.

methods.name: AddLeg(ConnectiveGeometry, Contour, Double)
methods.signature: public ConnectiveGeometry AddLeg(ConnectiveGeometry geometry, Contour polygon, double radius)
methods.summary: Appends a polygon section to this ConnectiveGeometry, using the specified radius for the cylindrical connection.

params.name: geometry
params.doc: ConnectiveGeometry used to create a connection with.

params.name: polygon
params.doc: the polygonal contour to add to this geometry

params.name: radius
params.doc: the specified radius for the connecting cylindrical section

returns.doc: Modified ConnectiveGeometry if command succeeded or geometry otherwise.

throws.when: Thrown if could not create or modify ConnectiveGeometry instance.
Thrown when geometry is a stand-alone bend geometry, meaning that the first GeometrySection is a BendSurfaceNode.

methods.name: AddLeg(ConnectiveGeometry, Contour, BentPlate.BendShape)
methods.signature: public ConnectiveGeometry AddLeg(ConnectiveGeometry geometry, Contour polygon, BentPlate.BendShape bendShape)
methods.summary: Appends a polygon section to ConnectiveGeometry, using the maximal radius for the cylindrical connection, or the maximum cone aperture for conical connection.

params.name: geometry
params.doc: ConnectiveGeometry used to create a connection with.

params.name: polygon
params.doc: The polygonal contour to add to geometry.

params.name: bendShape
params.doc: Shape of the bend that connects the leg

returns.doc: Modified ConnectiveGeometry if command succeeded or geometry otherwise.

throws.when: Thrown if could not create or modify ConnectiveGeometry instance.
Thrown when geometry is a stand-alone bend geometry, meaning that the first GeometrySection is a BendSurfaceNode.

methods.name: AddLeg(ConnectiveGeometry, LineSegment, Contour, LineSegment)
methods.signature: public ConnectiveGeometry AddLeg(ConnectiveGeometry geometry, LineSegment segment1, Contour polygon, LineSegment segment2)
methods.summary: Appends a polygon section to this ConnectiveGeometry, using the specified connection points and maximal radius for the cylindrical connection.

params.name: geometry
params.doc: ConnectiveGeometry used to create a connection with.

params.name: segment1
params.doc: the two connection points on this instance geometry

params.name: polygon
params.doc: the polygonal contour to add to this geometry

params.name: segment2
params.doc: the two connection points on polygon geometry

returns.doc: Modified ConnectiveGeometry if command succeeded or geometry otherwise.

throws.when: Thrown if could not create or modify ConnectiveGeometry instance.
Thrown when geometry is a stand-alone bend geometry, meaning that the first GeometrySection is a BendSurfaceNode.

methods.name: AddLeg(ConnectiveGeometry, Contour, Double, Double)
methods.signature: public ConnectiveGeometry AddLeg(ConnectiveGeometry geometry, Contour polygon, double largestRadius, double halfAperture)
methods.summary: Joins a polygon section to this ConnectiveGeometry, using the specified radius and aperture for the conical connection.

params.name: geometry
params.doc: ConnectiveGeometry used to create a connection with.

params.name: polygon
params.doc: the polygonal contour to add to this geometry

params.name: largestRadius
params.doc: The specified largest radius for the connecting conical section.

params.name: halfAperture
params.doc: The angle between the cone generatrix and any of its generator lines.

returns.doc: Modified ConnectiveGeometry if command succeeded or geometry otherwise.

throws.when: Thrown if could not create ConnectiveGeometry instance.
Thrown when geometry is a stand-alone bend geometry, meaning that the first GeometrySection is a BendSurfaceNode.

methods.name: AddLeg(ConnectiveGeometry, LineSegment, Contour, LineSegment, Double)
methods.signature: public ConnectiveGeometry AddLeg(ConnectiveGeometry geometry, LineSegment segment1, Contour polygon, LineSegment segment2, double radius)
methods.summary: Appends a polygon section to this ConnectiveGeometry, using the specified connection points and radius for the cylindrical connection.

params.name: geometry
params.doc: ConnectiveGeometry used to create a connection with.

params.name: segment1
params.doc: the two connection points on this instance geometry

params.name: polygon
params.doc: the polygonal contour to add to this geometry

params.name: segment2
params.doc: the two connection points on polygon geometry

params.name: radius
params.doc: the specified radius for the connecting cylindrical section

returns.doc: Modified ConnectiveGeometry if command succeeded or geometry otherwise.

throws.when: Thrown if could not create or modify ConnectiveGeometry instance.
Thrown when geometry is a stand-alone bend geometry, meaning that the first GeometrySection is a BendSurfaceNode.

methods.name: AddLeg(ConnectiveGeometry, LineSegment, Contour, LineSegment, BentPlate.BendShape)
methods.signature: public ConnectiveGeometry AddLeg(ConnectiveGeometry geometry, LineSegment segment1, Contour polygon, LineSegment segment2, BentPlate.BendShape bendShape)
methods.summary: Appends a polygon section to this ConnectiveGeometry, using the specified connection points and maximal radius for the cylindrical connection, or maximum aperture for conical connection.

params.name: geometry
params.doc: ConnectiveGeometry used to create a connection with.

params.name: segment1
params.doc: the two connection points on this instance geometry

params.name: polygon
params.doc: the polygonal contour to add to this geometry

params.name: segment2
params.doc: the two connection points on polygon geometry

params.name: bendShape
params.doc: Shape of the bend that connects the leg

returns.doc: Modified ConnectiveGeometry if command succeeded or geometry otherwise.

throws.when: Thrown if could not create or modify ConnectiveGeometry instance.
Thrown when geometry is a stand-alone bend geometry, meaning that the first GeometrySection is a BendSurfaceNode.

methods.name: AddLeg(ConnectiveGeometry, LineSegment, Contour, LineSegment, Double, Double)
methods.signature: public ConnectiveGeometry AddLeg(ConnectiveGeometry geometry, LineSegment segment1, Contour polygon, LineSegment segment2, double largestRadius, double halfAperture)
methods.summary: Joins a polygon section to this ConnectiveGeometry, using the specified connection points and radius and aperture for the conical connection.

params.name: geometry
params.doc: ConnectiveGeometry used to create a connection with.

params.name: segment1
params.doc: The two connection points on this instance geometry.

params.name: polygon
params.doc: the polygonal contour to add to this geometry

params.name: segment2
params.doc: The two connection points on polygon geometry.

params.name: largestRadius
params.doc: The specified largest radius for the connecting conical section.

params.name: halfAperture
params.doc: The angle between the cone generatrix and any of its generator lines.

returns.doc: Modified ConnectiveGeometry if command succeeded or geometry otherwise.

throws.when: Thrown if could not create ConnectiveGeometry instance.
Thrown when geometry is a stand-alone bend geometry, meaning that the first GeometrySection is a BendSurfaceNode.

methods.name: ModifyBendSurface
methods.signature: public ConnectiveGeometry ModifyBendSurface(ConnectiveGeometry geometry, GeometrySection bendSection, BendSurface surface)
methods.summary: Modifies the shape of a bend surface section, and updates related polygon sections accordingly.

params.name: geometry
params.doc: Reference geometry to modify which contains cylindricalSection.

params.name: bendSection
params.doc: Geometry section to modify.

params.name: surface
params.doc: The modified bend surface for the section.

returns.doc: Modified ConnectiveGeometry if command succeeded or geometry otherwise.

throws.when: Thrown if could not modify the bend surface.

methods.name: ModifyConicalRadiuses
methods.signature: public ConnectiveGeometry ModifyConicalRadiuses(ConnectiveGeometry geometry, GeometrySection conicalSection, double radius1, double radius2)
methods.summary: Modify the radiuses of a conical section, preserving the length of the side boundaries. The order of the provided radiuses is not relevant, as the cone vertex will be located on the same side of the plates as the original cone section.

params.name: geometry
params.doc: Reference geometry to modify which contains conicalSection.

params.name: conicalSection
params.doc: The conical geometry section to modify.

params.name: radius1
params.doc: New radius one of the cross sections of the cone.

params.name: radius2
params.doc: New radius of the other cross section of the cone.

returns.doc: Modified ConnectiveGeometry if command succeeded or geometry otherwise.

throws.when: Thrown if could not modify the geometry.

methods.name: ModifyCylindricalSurface
methods.signature: public ConnectiveGeometry ModifyCylindricalSurface(ConnectiveGeometry geometry, GeometrySection cylindricalSection, CylindricalSurface surface)
methods.summary: Modifies the shape of a cylindrical surface section, and updates related polygon sections accordingly.

methods.name: ModifyPolygon
methods.signature: public ConnectiveGeometry ModifyPolygon(ConnectiveGeometry geometry, GeometrySection polygonSection, Contour points)
methods.summary: Modify the shape of a polygon section, and updates related cylindrical sections accordingly.

params.name: geometry
params.doc: Reference geometry to modify which contains polygonSection.

params.name: polygonSection
params.doc: A polygon section from geometry to modify.

params.name: points
params.doc: The modified contour for the section.

returns.doc: Modified ConnectiveGeometry if command succeeded or geometry otherwise.

throws.when: Thrown if could not modify polygon.

methods.name: ModifyRadius
methods.signature: public ConnectiveGeometry ModifyRadius(ConnectiveGeometry geometry, GeometrySection cylindricalSection, double radius)
methods.summary: Modify the radius of a cylindrical section.

params.name: geometry
params.doc: Reference geometry to modify which contains cylindricalSection.

params.name: cylindricalSection
params.doc: The cylindrical geometry section to modify.

params.name: radius
params.doc: The new radius for the cylindrical section.

returns.doc: Modified ConnectiveGeometry if command succeeded or geometry otherwise.

throws.when: Thrown if could not modify radius.

methods.name: RemoveLeg
methods.signature: public ConnectiveGeometry RemoveLeg(ConnectiveGeometry geometry, GeometrySection legSection)
methods.summary: Removes a polygon section which is the end section, from this ConnectiveGeometry including extensions and cylindrical surface.

params.name: geometry
params.doc: ConnectiveGeometry used to remove a connection.

params.name: legSection
params.doc: Leg GeometrySection to remove.

returns.doc: Modified ConnectiveGeometry if command succeeded or geometry otherwise.

throws.when: Thrown when the supplied legSection is invalid leg section or geometry is a stand-alone bend geometry, meaning that the first GeometrySection is a BendSurfaceNode.

methods.name: ScaleConeSection
methods.signature: public ConnectiveGeometry ScaleConeSection(ConnectiveGeometry geometry, GeometrySection conicalSection, double scale)
methods.summary: Scale the shape of a conical section.

params.name: geometry
params.doc: Reference geometry to modify which contains conicalSection.

params.name: conicalSection
params.doc: The conical geometry section to modify.

params.name: scale
params.doc: Scale to apply to the conical section (greater than 0).

returns.doc: Modified ConnectiveGeometry if command succeeded or geometry otherwise.

throws.when: Thrown if could not modify the geometry.

methods.name: SetBendAngle
methods.signature: public ConnectiveGeometry SetBendAngle(double angle, GeometrySection sectionToSetAngle, GeometrySection sectionToMove, ConnectiveGeometry geometry)
methods.summary: Sets angle as the angle of curved section sectionToSetAngle and modifies geometry starting from sectionToMove.

params.name: angle
params.doc: Angle in degrees to set.

params.name: sectionToSetAngle
params.doc: Curved section to set angle value.

params.name: sectionToMove
params.doc: Could be curved or plate section, used to know which side of chain to modify.

params.name: geometry
params.doc: Geometry of the bent plate to modify.

returns.doc: Returns modified geometry with on success or initial geometry on fail.

methods.name: SetMainSection
methods.signature: public ConnectiveGeometry SetMainSection(GeometrySection newMainSection, ConnectiveGeometry geometry)
methods.summary: Sets newMainSection as a main section of geometry.

params.name: newMainSection
params.doc: Geometry section to set as main section.

params.name: geometry
params.doc: Connective geometry to modify.

returns.doc: Connective geometry with newMainSection as main section.

throws.when: Throws an ArgumentException exception if the input newMainSection is not a polygon section.

methods.name: Split
methods.signature: public IList<ConnectiveGeometry> Split(ConnectiveGeometry geometry, GeometrySection geometrySection)
methods.summary: Returns the resulting geometry or geometries when a section and the related automatically created sections are removed from this geometry.

params.name: geometry
params.doc: ConnectiveGeometry used for split operation.

params.name: geometrySection
params.doc: GeometrySection to remove.

returns.doc: The resulting geometries once the section and related automatic sections are removed.

throws.when: Thrown when the supplied geometrySection is invalid or geometry is a stand-alone bend geometry, meaning that the first GeometrySection is a BendSurfaceNode.
